synthesis.summary: ABSI is up 7.5% today and 26.6% over the past five days with no news in the supplied feed to explain either move. Volume is below average (rel volume 0.75), which rules out an obvious catalyst-driven surge; the RSI at 76 signals the stock is technically overbought after a sharp run. This looks like continuation momentum or short-covering rather than a news-driven event.
